tasks.name: Task 1
formula_warnings: formula "ggap-2018" is GGap (Geoff's GAP variant) — median distance validity, linear distance quality, √(Tmin/1800) time curve and flat leading weight are not reproducible; mapped to the nearest GAP-generation parameters
PG pre-2020 formula: mapped to the GAP2016/2018 weights (the "GAP2020" setting); the legacy Perl AirScore used its published weight knobs — verify parity
departure "Lkm" (km-marker bonus points) is not implemented — published scores include bonus points GlideComp omits
stopped-task glide bonus 5:1 differs from the engine's spec-fixed 4:1 for pg — only matters for stopped tasks
